ESC

About

Gabriel Correa (he/him)

  • (In progress) PhD Student in Linguistics, University of Massachusetts Amherst
  • (2025) A.B. Linguistics with Honors, cum laude, The University of Chicago

How to say my name

In Brazilian Portuguese, my name is pronounced [ga.bɾiˈɛʊ̯ koˈheɪ̯.ɐ]. I am very used to the English pronunciation of my name, which is what most people call me today. I do not mind the Spanish pronunciation either. As for my last name, I also happily accept any variation of /kəˈɹe.jə/ or /koˈre.a/.
